Preview Bridgespace inside Cursor
================================

1. In Cursor, open THIS folder as the workspace root:
   File → Open Folder → select "bridgespace-mvp"

2. Start the app:
   Terminal menu → Run Task… → choose "Bridgespace: dev server"
   Wait until the terminal shows "Ready" and a Local: http://localhost URL.

3. Open the in-editor browser:
   Ctrl+Shift+P (Command Palette)
   Type: Simple Browser: Show
   Enter URL: http://localhost:3000
   (If port 3000 is busy, use the port shown in the terminal, e.g. http://localhost:3001)

Tip: Command Prompt is set as the default terminal so npm is not blocked by PowerShell scripts.
